Kombiniert in der Mystischen Schmiede eine Gabe der Scharfen Spitze, eine Gabe des Metalls, einen "Stehende Steine"-Zeitmesser (oder einen Überrest) und einen Bären-Kriegshelm (oder Überrest) von beliebigem Gewicht, um Nyr Hrammr herzustellen. Überreste können bei Händlern für Ansehen-Herzen gekauft werden, falls Ihr die Gegenstände nicht mehr habt.Erschaffen in der Mystischen Schmiede durch Kombination von:• 6 Deldrimor-Stahl-Speerspitzen• 6 Große Geisterholz-Stiele• 6 Visionskristalle• 1 Erinnerung an Kontrahenten der Bärlinge

Korag and his fellow jotun are victims of the worst kind of spiritual abuse by the Sons of Svanir. This treachery is the latest in a long history of jotun suffering. The jotun deserve a second chance, and Eir will understand if you show them mercy.
Kormir was once a human. Then she became a god. I wonder if it is possible for that to happen again. Perhaps, a long time from now, Tyria will make gods again.

Korukhan the Blacksmith has located one of the necromancer's amulets at Durgar's Homestead. The Order of Whispers agent needs your help to find the amulet before it does any serious damage...and to help locate the missing body of your comrade, Howl the Brazen.

Kryta's troubles are many, reaching back to antiquity. It's fortunate for our nation that we have heroes such as you, willing to stand against villains.In recent days, there has been a gathering whisper in the darkness, a marshaling of forces. The orders you intercepted allowed us to take the fight to them, and for that I'm grateful.Should you find any further enemy communications in the field, bring them to me that we might keep a shining light upon evil.—Ralan
Kudu is dead, but the evil that asura do lives on beyond their end. One part of the Inquest's master plan has been shattered, but the machine of terror they have created lives on.

Lady Joon's underwater reactor is the final facility to be completed in New Kaineng.The facility will rest on an old outpost built after the flood. It was used to track Risen movements out of the ruins of the old city to the north. The outpost had been closed, gods, how many years has it been...twenty-six? When the walls finally went up, it was abandoned—it was no longer necessary. And then came jade tech.Rumor has it, the outpost was being used as a Purist hideout. I haven't been able to confirm this information, yet, but if there's an ounce of truth to that speculation... Well, they'll need to come up for air eventually.Minister Doh Preeda, Ministry of Archives, 1836 CC
Lady Nari once wrote that runes are imbued with the memories of ancient warriors and that the effects they grant are remnants of their power.

Lady Vavrinec,    It is with a heavy heart and as much empathy as I can squeeze onto this page that I inform you that my wife, your oldest daughter, died in the attack on Lion's Arch. I...I tried to get to her in time, to get her out, but when I arrived at the bay she was already gone. They told me that a wave caused by the drill swept her and her crew right in. No one could reach them in time, there was too much destruction. I have yet to recover the body...    I'm writing to you from a camp just outside of the city, but I'm going back in. Not just to find our beloved girl, my sweet Orla, but to fight back against this. To take back what is ours, and to establish peace that was taken from us. For Orla. For the lives that were taken. For the city that was destroyed.    Whatever happens next, just know that I loved your daughter. I know our love wasn't an easy thing to accept, but in the Pale Tree's name...her death will not go without justice. Be safe. We don't know what comes in the days ahead.Secondborn Bothain
